## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Mehdi Djabri's company (Revo/IterationX) for AI-powered content marketing and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-augmented content marketing services for $9K/month with a 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Mehdi is interested but concerned about the long-term commitment at his startup's stage](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2802.0)
  - [GrowthX agreed to consider a 30-day pilot to reduce initial risk](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)
  - [Both companies are in growth phases (GrowthX Series A, Mehdi's company seed round)](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=3002.0)

## Topics

### Revo/IterationX Background

  - [AI-powered product management tool started in 2021](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Uses LLMs to highlight product insights, competitor analysis, and customer feedback](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Positioned as an "AI teammate" for product teams](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Gaining traction with clients like Deal.com](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Currently raising a seed round](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=3499.0)

### GrowthX Services Overview

  - [AI-augmented content marketing and SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)
  - [$9K/month for 50,000 words (about 8 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [12-month commitment standard, considering 30-day pilot for Mehdi](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2905.0)
  - [Team includes managing directors, editors, and content managers](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
  - [Use proprietary workflows and tools (e.g. Content OS in Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2529.0)
  - [Typical results: Significant organic traffic growth starting around month 3](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2349.0)

### GrowthX Differentiators

  - [Hybrid of SaaS and agency model](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows managed by experienced growth/SEO experts](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [End-to-end service including strategy, content creation, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Work with major clients like Reddit and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### Potential Partnership Discussion

  - [Mehdi interested but concerned about 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2802.0)
  - [GrowthX considering 30-day pilot to reduce initial risk](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)
  - [Timing: Potential late May start after Mehdi's seed round closes](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=3508.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to send SOW with 30-day pilot option](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send SOW with 30-day pilot option to Mehdi](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)
  - [Mehdi to review SOW and consider timing post-seed round closing](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=3442.0)
  - [Potential late May start date if both parties agree to move forward](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=3508.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for further communication if partnership proceeds](https://fathom.video/share/SHj4CWAq35NMiC2RnSZPLDrmEbjg9Bwi?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)
